english_query: Yes, and I think that I was right.
ugf_response: You also said that the person who does bad things is happy if he does not get in trouble?

english_query: The people who teach for money, who know all that can be known about the mind, and talk back only because they have too much able to think well, would have had a real fight over this, and would have hit their ideas together well. But you and I, who do not want to do this for work, only want to see how these ways of being right fit together, if they agree with each other or not.
ugf_response: Yes, that would be my want.

english_query: No at all old teacher, they do not agree; you may hear them saying at one time that being good can be taught, and then again the thing that is not that.
ugf_response: Can we call those people teachers who do not say that their own job is possible?

english_query: As the dogs get help from the way the person who goes after wild things works, and the big animals get help from the way the person who watches them works, and all other things are looked after so they do well and not so they get hurt?
ugf_response: For sure, not so they get hurt.

english_query: Also, food is needed to grow. But growing means being able to be changed. Since the body of the first person could not be changed; it does not seem that food was needed by him.
ugf_response: A certain change happens to the food when it turns into the stuff of the thing that grows. So we cannot say from this that the body of the first person could be changed, but that the food taken could be changed; even though this kind of change helped the way things are be full.

english_query: Also, an old teacher who knows much says that god is one because he has no number. But having many means having number. So there are not many persons in god.
ugf_response: The big one and simple way god is keeps out any kind of many things in what he is, but not many ways he stands to others. Because we say these ways as they point to others, and so these ways do not make him many parts inside, as that same old teacher who knows much teaches.

english_query: Also, people who call bad spirits look at certain star groups to call them. But these spirits would not be called by the stars unless they had to do what the stars say. So they have to do what the stars say.
ugf_response: Bad spirits come when called by star groups for two reasons. First, to make people think stars have god power. Second, because they think the stuff around us is better set for the thing they want when those stars are in place.

english_query: Also, every cut is made by things that are against each other. But these three do not seem to be against each other. For the good is nice to have, and no bad thing is good for us. But this should not be true if the cut was by things against each other, for then the good and the good-for-us would be against each other. And the old teacher talks about this. So this cut is wrong.
ugf_response: This cut is not by things that are against each other, but by ways of looking at them. Now we call things nice to have if they are wanted only because they feel good, even if they hurt or are not good. But the good-for-us is for things that are not wanted for themselves, but only because they help get something else, like drinking a drink that feels bad in the mouth but helps the body. While the good is said of things that are wanted for themselves.

english_query: Also, if the Son is made by the Father, either he is always being made, or there is a time when he is made. If he is always being made, then because making means not being done yet, he would always be not done, which is wrong. So there must be a time when he was made, and before that time he was not there.
ugf_response: In time, there is a single point that cannot be cut, and there is time that goes on. But in the forever time, the single point stays still. The making of the Son is not in the time that goes on, but in the forever time. So to show this forever staying, we can say he is always being made, as one old teacher said. But as other old teachers said, it is better to say he is always made, so that always shows the forever staying, and made shows he is all done. So he is not not done, and there was no time when he was not there.

english_query: Also, if you say the feeling part in man does not end; on the other hand, the old teacher who thinks well says that things that end and things that do not end are very different kinds. But the feeling part in a horse, a big cat, and other animals that cannot talk does end. So, if in man it does not end, the feeling part in man and in these animals is not the same kind. Now we call a living thing an animal because it has a feeling part; so 'animal' would not be one kind for man and other animals, which is wrong.
ugf_response: It is not the shapes, but the whole things put together, that are put into kinds. Now man ends like other animals. So the change between ending and not ending, which is about the shapes, does not mean man and other animals are of different kinds.

english_query: Also, the sending of the god part is a coming out, as said before. But the coming out of the one who is born and the one who is the spirit are different. So if both are sent, they are different ways of being sent; and then one would be extra, since one would be enough to make the creature good.
ugf_response: Since sending means where the one sent comes from, and his being inside by the good gift, as said before, if we talk about sending by where it comes from, the way the one who is born is sent is different from the way the one who is the spirit is sent, like being born is different from breathing out. If we look at sending by what the good gift does, the two ways of being sent are joined in the start which is the good gift, but are different in what the good gift does, which is making the mind see and making the heart feel. So it is clear that one way of being sent cannot be without the other, because not one happens without the good gift that makes good, nor is one god part away from the other.

english_query: Very true, the old teacher.
ugf_response: Too true, my friend, as I well know; there is, however, one special thing in their case: when they begin to think alone about their not liking the love of knowing, if they have the power to hear the idea out, and do not run away, they grow at last in a way I cannot say not happy with themselves; their way of speaking well fades away, and they become like small people who cannot do things. These however are going off side ways from which we must now stop, or they will fill up, and cover the first idea; to which, if you please, we will now go back.

english_query: Also, the telling of times and days started on the first day. So the lights were not made to tell times and days and years.
ugf_response: The big break of time into day and night happened on the first day, about the moving of the sky that is for all the sky and could have started then. But the small telling of days and times and years, like one day being hotter than another, or one time being different from another, comes from the moving of the stars: and this moving could have started on the day after the third one.

english_query: Also, to know your own act of knowing is to know something that is not big or main, but small and extra. If the one who is all is his own act of knowing, his act of knowing will be like when we know our act of knowing: and so the act of knowing of the one who is all will not be something big.
ugf_response: When that act of knowing that does not stand on its own is known, something not big is known; as when we know our act of knowing; and so this cannot be like the act of the one who is all knowing which stands on its own. This shows the answer to the third point. For the act of the one who is all knowing stands on its own, and is part of its very being and not part of something else; so it does not go on forever.

english_query: Exactly; and I want you to think about if this means that the group of one hundred twenty is thought to be a group of one hundred ten?
ugf_response: Yes, that seems to be so.

english_query: Do the person who knows a lot and the person who does not know, and the person who is not afraid and the person who is afraid, have the same size of good feeling and bad feeling? Or would you say that the person who is afraid has more?
ugf_response: I should say that he does.

english_query: Also, any way of study has a first thing and the answers we get must be about that first thing. But in the book about god we get answers not only about god but also many other things like life and what is right and wrong. So god is not the first thing of this way of study.
ugf_response: All the other answers that come in this god book way of study are still about god, not as different parts or by chance things but in a way that are together with him.

english_query: Also, all things want their end. But not all things want god, because not all even know him. So god is not the end of all things.
ugf_response: All things want god as their end when they want some good thing, whether this want is in the mind or in the senses or in how things grow, meaning without knowing; because nothing is good and wanted unless it has some of the look of god.

english_query: And what change does that make?
ugf_response: No change; only I should like further to know whether the people of the city are supposed to have been made better by the great leader of long ago, or, on the other hand, to have been made bad by him; for I hear that he was the first who gave the people money, and made them do nothing and be scared, and helped them in the love of talk and money.

english_query: Also, all knowing is either the start of the thing known, or started by it. But the knowing of god is not the start of bad things, nor is it started by bad things. So god does not know bad things.
ugf_response: The knowing of god is not the start of bad things; but it is the start of the good way in which bad things are known.

english_query: It looks like the teaching about god is not about giving reasons. For an old teacher of the church says: 'Put reasons to the side where trust is needed.' But in this teaching, trust is most needed: 'But these things are written that you may believe.' So the teaching about god is not about giving reasons.
ugf_response: Even though reasons from human thinking cannot show why we must take trust, still, this teaching uses things we trust to show other true things.

english_query: I agree; take me where you want, for I know that you are like the thing that decides what happens; no one can get away from any point you make for them. But I do not want to go further than you say.
ugf_response: One time is enough; and now be very careful that we do not again by chance put us in the way of being told we are talking like little kids.

english_query: Also the old teacher who thinks well says we know the whole thing before we know the parts that make it up. But the big group is a part of the small group, like 'living thing' is part of what makes a 'person'. So we know the big groups last.
ugf_response: We can know a part in two ways. First, by itself; and so we can know parts before the whole, like we know rocks before we know a house. Second, as part of a whole; and so we must know the whole before the parts. For we know a house in a not clear way before we know its pieces. So the parts of what something really is are known before the thing is known; else the thing would not be known at all. But as parts of what something really is they are known after. For we know a person in a not clear way before we know all that makes a person.

english_query: It looks like no made mind can see what god really is. The old man who talks, about a line in a book, says "No one has ever seen god." He adds that not only the men who speak for god, but also the big men who bring news and the higher big men who bring news have not seen god. He asks how a made thing can see something that cannot be made. The old man from a far place also says that there is no feeling, no shape, no thought, no think, no what is known about him.
ugf_response: Both of these old men are talking about the seeing of understanding. So the old man from a far place first says that god is not understood by any people, and then says the words we heard. The old man who talks also, after his words, says that he is talking about the most clear seeing of the first one, which is a full thought and understanding that the first one has of the second one.

english_query: The free use of words, rather than small clear parts, is usually part of a good learning, and the other way is too hard; but sometimes clear parts are needed, and I think that the answer you just gave is open to the idea of being wrong; for which is more right, to say that we see or hear with the eyes and with the ears, or through the eyes and through the ears?
ugf_response: I should say through, old teacher, rather than with.

english_query: Also, man moves himself like all other living things. Now every thing that moves itself has two parts: one that moves and one that is moved, as the old teacher who knew much shows. But the part that moves is the soul. So the other part must be able to be moved. But the first stuff cannot be moved, since it is only a thing that could be; and every thing that moves is a body. So in man and every living thing there must be another main shape, by which the body is made.
ugf_response: The soul does not move the body by being its main shape, but by the power that makes it go, the use of which needs the body to already be made real by the soul: so that the soul by its moving power is the part that moves; and the living body is the part that is moved.

english_query: And I, young man, like what I am saying. Some things I have said of which I am not sure at all. But that we will be better and more ready to face fear and less like we have no power if we think we should look for answers, than if we thought it was no use to try to know what we do not know; that is a point I am ready to fight for, in words and in what I do, with all my might.
ugf_response: There again, old teacher, your words seem to me very good.

english_query: Yes certainly, if he wanted to be so.
ugf_response: But would he not have wanted? He would, for sure, have wanted to make his own son a good man and a good person; he could not have been mad at him, or have on set out to keep from giving to him his own good way. Did you never hear that he made his son a well known rider of horses; and had him taught to stand straight on the horse and throw a sharp stick, and to do many other great things; and in anything which could be learned from a teacher he was well trained? Have you not heard from our old people of him?

english_query: Also, it is written: 'We see now through a glass in a dark way; but then face to face.' This shows there are two ways to know God. One is seeing Him in what He really is, which is called seeing face to face. The other is seeing Him in the mirror of made things. As was shown before, a spirit thing cannot have the first way by his own born power. And the second way, seeing through a mirror, does not belong to spirit things, because they do not get their knowing of God from things we can see, as an old teacher able to think well says. So spirit things cannot know God by their born powers.
ugf_response: The knowing a spirit thing has of God is in the middle between these two kinds of knowing; still, it is closer to one of them, as was said above.

english_query: It looks like the way god is tied to others is not the same as what god really is. For the great old church teacher says that not all we say about god is said of his real being, because we say some things about how he stands to others, like father to son: but such things do not point to his real being. So the tie is not what god really is.
ugf_response: Those words of the great old church teacher do not mean that being a father or any other tie in god is not in its very being the same as what god really is; but that we do not say it as a real being, as if it were just there in him; but as a tie. So we say there are only two ways to talk about god, since other ways point to how they stand to what they are about, both in their wide and narrow sense; but nothing in god can stand to what it is in or who it is about, except the tie of being the same; and this is because god is so simple.

english_query: And do you not agree in that way of seeing things, old teacher?
ugf_response: If you do, my friend; but I want to know first, whether you say that breaking all things down into their small parts is a good way to explain them, and looking at them as letters or bigger groups of letters is not a good way--is this your way of seeing things?

english_query: I do not think that I can.
ugf_response: Listen, then, to what the other side says, which is said by the people who say things are just how they look. They would say, as I imagine, can that which is all different from something have the same thing as that from which it is different? and look, the bright young one, that the word 'other' means not 'a little,' but 'all different.'

english_query: Someone might ask, can a person who has learned something and keeps it in mind not know it when they think of it? I am afraid I am using a long way to ask a simple thing, which is only, can a person who has learned and remembers fail to know?
ugf_response: That cannot happen, old teacher; the idea is very wrong.

english_query: Say instead, the hot one, can not be done; because who can show a real thing wrong?
ugf_response: What do you mean? If a man is found trying to take all power in a bad way and when found he is put on a board that hurts his eyes hurt and can not see and after many bad hurt and his family also hurt and at last he is put a stick in or cover with black stuff and set on fire will he be more happy than if he can run away and become the person who takes all power and keep all time doing what he wants and hold the control of the group that runs things and have people who want what he has and people who look up to him? Is that the question you say can not be shown wrong?

english_query: Also, the one who makes is the cause of the work of the thing made, by giving it the shape that lets it work. So if God is the cause of the work of things He made, it is only because He gave them the power to work. But this happens at the start, when He makes them. So it seems God does not work any more in the living thing that works.
ugf_response: God does not only give things their shape, but He also keeps them in being, and moves them to act, and is also the end point of every act, as said before.

english_query: Also, water is by its way of being wet and moving, and wet moving things cannot stay on a round ball, as we can see. So, because the sky is a round ball, there cannot be water above it.
ugf_response: The answer is clear from what was said before, for the last two ways of seeing it. But for the first way, an old church teacher gives two answers. First, he says that a thing that looks like a cup from the bottom does not have to be round out on the top. Second, he says that the water above the sky is not wet and moving, but is hard like ice, sitting outside it in a hard state, which some writers call the glass sky.

english_query: Then this is the new idea, however it may turn out, which you and I have with hard work brought into the world. And now that it is here, we must look at it close, and see whether it is good to keep, or is only a thing that is not real and a lie. Is it to be kept in any case, and not thrown out? or will you bear to see it turned away, and not get mad if I take away your first idea?
ugf_response: The young student will not be mad, for he is very kind. But tell me old teacher, in the name of the sky, is this, after all, not the true thing?

english_query: It looks like the first man saw what god really is. Because the great good of man comes from seeing what god really is. But the first man, while in the good place, had a life of great good, as an old man who knows much says. And the great old church teacher says: 'If man had the same likes as now, how good must he have been in that place of great good!' So the first man in the good place saw what god really is.
ugf_response: Man had good in the good place, but not that perfect good he was meant for, which comes from seeing what god really is. He had, however, 'a life of good in some way,' as the great old church teacher says, in so far as he was whole and right.

english_query: Will you count them out?
ugf_response: Getting money, fixing the body, and being right.

english_query: The great old church teacher says it is not wrong to think that the lower powers in the air make all things we see happen. But when a thing happens not by its normal way, we call it a wonder, like when a sick person gets well without the usual help of how things work. So the good spirits and bad spirits can make wonders.
ugf_response: The spirit powers can make whatever happens in the world we see, by using the small parts of things and moving them from one place to another.
